elements.label: Description
elements.value: Points awarded when a merge creates a new tier. Higher tiers = more points. Current curve: 1, 3, 6, 10, 15, 21, 28, 36, 45, 55, 66

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/properties/point_values.schema.json, set pvt_multiplier to {{pvt_multiplier}}]
Multiply all tier score values by {{pvt_multiplier}}x in data/MergeLadder.ts.
